title: Concern Extraction and Strict Validation Architecture
progress: Implemented first extraction slice: Pydantic contracts, versioned YAML registries for educational levers and runtime scenarios, registry loaders, optional Pandera-compatible result validation, Streamlit control binding to registry metadata, runtime scenario lookup validation, public mirror sync, concern-boundary scanner, and regression tests. Track remains active for absent full parameterised-model modules when available.
output: Typed contracts, versioned registries, registry-backed runtime/UI adapters, optional Pandera-compatible validation, concern-boundary gate, public mirror, and green root/public validation
